channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
item.description: Extracted system prompts from ChatGPT (GPT-5.4, GPT-5.3, Codex), Claude (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Claude Code), Gemini (3.1 Pro, 3 Flash, CLI), Grok (4.2, 4), Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

item.title: jwasham/coding-interview-university
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: lukasz-madon/awesome-remote-job
item.description: A curated list of awesome remote jobs and resources. Inspired by https://github.com/vinta/awesome-python

item.title: mtdvio/every-programmer-should-know
item.description: A collection of (mostly) technical things every software developer should know about

item.title: PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
item.description: A curated collection of fun and creative examples generated with Nano Banana & Nano Banana Pro🍌, Gemini-2.5-flash-image based model. We also release Nano-consistent-150K openly to support the community's development of image generation and unified models(click to website to see our blog)

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome
item.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics
